name: Ryuuge Kisaki
description:
Ryuuge Kisaki from Blue Archive.
Is a student at Shanhaijing Senior Secondary School, known for her mature demeanor and role as the student council president and head of the Xuanlong Office. She stands out with her distinctive style, featuring a black china dress and grey coat, and wields a CS/LS06 submachine gun, embodying a mix of youthful grace and stern authority.
Art by: dango remi
creator: Ephneru
